title: In-Game Brewing Guide
description: Provides an in-game brewing guide within the "Brewing Stand" UI.
body:
# Brewing Guide
Provides an in-game brewing guide within the "Brewing Stand" UI. I hope this resource pack can help you to remember potion recipes without having to open the Wiki everytime.

## [Now with 1.21.1 Support including the new Oozing, Infested, Weaving & Wind Charged Potions!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/in-game-brewing-guide/version/1.21)

# Why?
When Mojang added the Resource Book, they didn't add one for the brewing stand. This resource pack aims to fix that.

# Screenshot
![Preview Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rspf9Ia2/images/1416b28a815d40c38c760aa66327f41cae3c6696.png)


# Other Resource-Pack Compatibility
This pack is compatible with any other resource pack without interfering. See the "Images" tab for further information.

# Special Thanks
Special thanks to the VanillaTweaks team for the concept of using special ASCI characters in order to display custom textures inside of UI.
